paradigm_definition: Choose or construct high-quality solutions by optimizing explicit objectives under constraints.

dimension_views.label: Decision Object
dimension_views.definition: What is being chosen or optimized.

selected_values_expanded.label: Parameters / Configurations
selected_values_expanded.definition: Scalar coefficients, gains, thresholds, weights, or configuration settings.

dimension_views.label: Evaluation Access
dimension_views.definition: How candidate quality can be evaluated.

selected_values_expanded.label: Direct / Analytic
selected_values_expanded.definition: Evaluate using explicit mathematical or logical relations.

dimension_views.label: Feasibility Structure
dimension_views.definition: How validity or admissibility is encoded.

selected_values_expanded.label: Absolute Bounds
selected_values_expanded.definition: Impose hard limits whose violation invalidates the candidate outright.

dimension_views.label: Optimization Stance
dimension_views.definition: What notion of optimality or admissible success is being sought.

selected_values_expanded.label: Extremum Seeking
selected_values_expanded.definition: Drive a criterion toward its best attainable value within the admissible solution space.

dimension_views.label: Optimization Role
dimension_views.definition: What optimization primarily does in the larger route.

selected_values_expanded.label: Design / Configure
selected_values_expanded.definition: Choose the system’s structure, topology, layout, composition, or configuration.

dimension_views.label: Solution Logic
dimension_views.definition: How the optimization process advances toward a solution.

selected_values_expanded.label: Directional stepping
selected_values_expanded.definition: move along a locally improving direction

dimension_views.label: Temporal Commitment
dimension_views.definition: When decisions are committed and revised.

selected_values_expanded.label: One-Shot
selected_values_expanded.definition: Solve once for a fixed decision episode.

dimension_views.label: Variable Type
dimension_views.definition: Continuous/discrete structure of the central decision variable regime.

selected_values_expanded.label: Continuous
selected_values_expanded.definition: Decision variables vary over a continuous range.

support_edge_hints.operator_family: Reparameterize or relax constraints to improve tractability
support_edge_hints.mechanism_summary: Figure-2 recurrent interaction pattern: reparameterize or relax constraints to improve tractability. Use when transformation supports optimization through this recurrent interaction pattern.

support_edge_hints.operator_family: Global gradient free search for nonconvex objectives
support_edge_hints.mechanism_summary: Figure-2 recurrent interaction pattern: global gradient free search for nonconvex objectives. Use when evolutionary supports optimization through this recurrent interaction pattern.
